title: Go 1.26 and amqp091-go 1.12 Client Contract · Contract Triage
summary: An incident packet contains a plausible a reviewed Go client API and lifecycle contract with one stale generation, blocked notification, goroutine leak, acknowledgement, route, or effect defect; locate cause before repair. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in a reviewed Go client API and lifecycle contract and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence de…
objectives: Pin Go 1.26.5, amqp091-go 1.12.0, AMQP 0-9-1, RabbitMQ 4.3.2, and the tested operating targets as one reviewed compatibility contract.
Classify amqp091-go methods, synchronous errors, notification channels, delivery channels, contexts, and confirmation streams by ownership and completion meaning.
Treat Delivery fields, properties, headers, and body bytes as untrusted data and validate decoded Go values before domain use.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and Go Inspect the failure record · Debug Runtime Client Version
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug Go messaging team handles case 8787 during outbox relay recovery after a database commit. Build deterministic Go evidence to gate delivered bytes and amqp091 notification ownership without mistaking Go types for validation; separate deterministic browser proof from race-enabled and live-broker evidence; then lose a quorum member and recompute majority availability. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. amqp091-go, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, race and leak checks, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Pin Go 1.26.5, amqp091-go 1.12.0, AMQP 0-9-1, RabbitMQ 4.3.2, and the tested operating targets as one reviewed compatibility contract.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and Go Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Clean Client Build

steps.instruction:
Write the debug evidence note for Clean Client Build: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A debug Go messaging team handles case 4835 during canary Go consumer decoding old and new envelopes. Build deterministic Go evidence to gate delivered bytes and amqp091 notification ownership without mistaking Go types for validation; separate deterministic browser proof from race-enabled and live-broker evidence; then close the owning channel before one delivery decision. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. amqp091-go, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, race and leak checks, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates.
